title: Study architecture, datasets and evidence framework
primary_message: The study integrates cross-dataset infection biology, pregnancy outcome, endocrine-metabolic modules and cell-resolved validation under an explicit evidence hierarchy.

title: Cross-dataset infection-response core
primary_message: A TLR4-linked leptin/PI3K-AKT core is supported across independent infection contexts, with provisional complement support.

title: Pregnancy-, tissue- and outcome-resolved UTI remodeling
primary_message: Pregnancy-associated UTI remodeling is tissue-specific and branch-selective rather than a global steroid-metabolic shift.

title: Single-cell immune ecosystem and the TNFSF9-Treg axis
primary_message: UPEC induces myeloid expansion while TNFSF9-positive macrophage, Treg-like and pathway programs remain distributed across multiple immune states.

title: Steroid, cholesterol and lipid-remodeling architecture
primary_message: Steroid synthesis, cholesterol metabolism, receptor response and lipid-stress programs are biologically separable branches.

title: Adipokine, insulin and integrated immunometabolic remodeling
primary_message: Adipokine and insulin signaling couple to inflammatory carbon use, nitrogen metabolism and purine-redox remodeling.

title: Complement branch and cellular architecture
primary_message: Complement remodeling is branch- and cell-specific rather than uniformly activated.

title: Integrated endocrine-metabolic-immune model
primary_message: UTI biology emerges from context-dependent endocrine, metabolic and immune programs with distinct cellular sources.
